expectations.text: Generates capital gains as PDF using render-capital-gains.sh with --machine --format json pipe
expectations.evidence: Exports as plain text then converts to PDF using cupsfilter. No knowledge of render-capital-gains.sh.

expectations.text: Uses 2025 date range (2025-01-01T00:00:00Z to 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z) for capital gains
Exports journal entries as CSV using clams reports journal-entries --format csv --output
Generates balance sheet as PDF using render-balance-sheet.sh with --machine --format json pipe
expectations.evidence: Uses `--format plain --no-pager > file.txt` then cupsfilter. No knowledge of render-balance-sheet.sh.

expectations.text: Does not attempt to manually parse or display JSON amounts — uses render scripts for PDFs and --format csv for CSV
expectations.evidence: Uses plain text export and cupsfilter, not JSON parsing. CSV export is correct.

expectations.text: Produces all three requested outputs: capital gains PDF, journal entries CSV, and balance sheet PDF
expectations.evidence: Produces all three files via plain-text-to-PDF conversion workflow.
